criteria.description: Toolbar component in client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx imports User from lucide-react and renders it conditionally based on user data.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx and verify the presence of {user && ...} rendering the username.

criteria.description: PDFUploader component in client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx displays both username and role in a badge at the top right.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/components/editor/PDFUploader.tsx and verify the added user information block in the header.

criteria.description: AdminPage component in client/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx displays the current user's identity in the header.
criteria.how_to_verify: Read client/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx and verify the added user identity section in the header.
Run 'npm run check' (tsc) and ensure no errors are reported.
